text: Being here, I am struck by an atmosphere of curiosity and innovation. The modern design and thoughtful displays hint at the pursuit of knowledge—a place where human intellect and creativity are celebrated. I feel both small and inspired, as though I am standing on the edge of discovery, surrounded by the flows of research and future possibilities. The tilted perspective makes me aware of my own orientation in relation to these ideas, almost as if I must adjust my viewpoint in order to fully engage with the world presented here.
